design.title: Arthavest — Investasi UMKM Indonesia dengan SuiStream
design.reference: Stripe Press × a16z portfolio pitch deck — warm cream background, deep emerald primary, amber accent, generous whitespace, monospace numerics

slides.title: Cover — Arthavest
slides.task_brief:
COVER SLIDE — full-bleed dark emerald gradient (use .slide-cover class). Layout: left-aligned content stack with generous whitespace.

TOP-LEFT: small badge 'SUI OVERFLOW HACKATHON 2025' in pill-dark style.

HEADLINE (huge, Plus Jakarta Sans 800, 64-72px, color #FAFAF7, 2 lines):
'Investasi UMKM Indonesia.
Profit mengalir per detik.'

SUB-HEADLINE (Inter 500, 22px, color rgba(250,250,247,0.75), max-width 720px):
'Marketplace kepemilikan fraksional UMKM dengan distribusi profit via SuiStream primitive di jaringan Sui. Zero platform fee, zero manual transfer, atomic.'

BOTTOM-LEFT ROW (3 mini-stats in monospace, separated by · dot):
'6 UMKM terverifikasi · 47-312 investor/UMKM · 18-23% estimasi APY'

BOTTOM-RIGHT: a stylized SVG decoration — three horizontal flowing dotted lines with 3 small circles (colored #F59E0B, #14B8A6, #FCD34D) representing money streams. Each circle pulses with subtle glow (box-shadow). Lines use stroke-dasharray for animated feel.

Speaker notes: 3-5 bullet hints covering hook (UMKM Indonesia massive but underfunded), unique Sui value (SuiStream = composable money stream primitive), combo product (marketplace + primitive), and tagline.

slides.title: Problem — UMKM Indonesia underfunded, investors lack access
slides.task_brief:
PROBLEM SLIDE — cream background. Two-column layout: LEFT 55% narrative, RIGHT 45% visual stats card.

EYEBROW: 'MASALAH'

HEADLINE (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 44px, color #1A1A1A):
'UMKM Indonesia raksasa, tapi investor tak punya akses.'

LEAD PARAGRAPH (Inter 400, 17px, color #404040, line-height 1.6, max-width 480px):
'64 juta UMKM menyumbang 60% PDB Indonesia, tapi 9 dari 10 tidak bisa akses pinjaman bank. Investor retail juga tidak punya jalur investasi kecil ke bisnis lokal — minimum Rp 100 juta di sekuritas, no fractional ownership, no real-time profit.'

BELOW PARAGRAPH — three pain-point bullets with red dot icon (•):
• 'Pinjaman bank butuh agunan & 6-12 bulan proses — 87% UMKM ditolak'
• 'Saham publik butuh Rp 100jt min — barrier terlalu tinggi untuk Gen Z & milenial'
• 'Crowdfunding konvensional pakai platform fee 10-20% & manual transfer bulanan'

RIGHT COLUMN — vertical stack of 3 stat cards (.card-glow style):
Card 1: huge number '64M' (metric-num, color #0D9488) + label 'UMKM aktif di Indonesia' + sublabel 'sumber: Kemenkop UKM 2024'
Card 2: huge number '60%' (metric-num-accent, color #D97706) + label 'kontribusi PDB Indonesia' + sublabel 'tapi akses kredit < 12%'
Card 3: huge number 'Rp 1.2Q' (metric-num, color #E11D48) + label 'funding gap tahunan' + sublabel 'sektor informal Indonesia'

FOOTER: 'Arthavest · Sui Overflow 2025' | 'Slide 02 / 08'

Speaker notes: 3-5 hints — open with the paradox (UMKM besar tapi underfunded), explain funding gap, mention Gen Z investor demand, transition to solution.

slides.title: Solution — Arthavest + SuiStream combo
slides.task_brief:
SOLUTION SLIDE — cream background. Headline at top, two-layer stacked diagram below.

EYEBROW: 'SOLUSI'

HEADLINE (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 40px):
'Dua lapisan, satu pengalaman: primitive + aplikasi.'

SUB (Inter 400, 15px, color #737373, max-width 720px):
'Arthavest adalah aplikasi yang dibangun di atas SuiStream — primitive money-stream yang composable. Profit bulanan UMKM dikonversi menjadi stream object yang mengalir ke wallet investor setiap detik.'

BELOW — two horizontally-stacked layer cards (.card style, 48% width each, gap 24px):

LAYER 1 CARD (left, with emerald left border 4px):
  • Top pill: 'LAYER 1 · PRIMITIVE' in pill-emerald
  • Title: 'SuiStream' (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 28px, color #0D9488)
  • Tagline: 'Money stream sebagai object Move — composable, transferable, fractionalizable'
  • 4 capability chips (pill style, small): 'Rate per detik' · 'Cliff & vesting' · 'Transferable' · 'Cancellable'
  • Footer mono code: 'module suistream::stream'

LAYER 2 CARD (right, with amber left border 4px):
  • Top pill: 'LAYER 2 · APLIKASI' in pill-amber
  • Title: 'Arthavest' (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 28px, color #D97706)
  • Tagline: 'Marketplace UMKM + distribusi profit via SuiStream'
  • 5 numbered steps with small dots:
    1. UMKM onboard (mint NFT + share tokens)
    2. Investor beli share (PTB atomic)
    3. Owner lapork profit (Walrus proof)
    4. Distribusi otomatis (PTB bulk create_stream)
    5. Investor withdraw (sub-second)

BOTTOM — single horizontal arrow connecting Layer 1 → Layer 2 with label 'composed via PTB' (font-num, color #737373).

FOOTER: 'Arthavest · Sui Overflow 2025' | 'Slide 03 / 08'

Speaker notes: 3-5 hints — explain why combo matters (primitive reusable, app showcases), emphasize SuiStream can be used by other apps, mention atomic distribution.

slides.title: Demo — Live product walkthrough
slides.task_brief:
DEMO SLIDE — cream background. Showcase actual product UI via CSS-drawn mockup tiles.

EYEBROW: 'DEMO LIVE'

HEADLINE (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 40px):
'Lima alur utama, satu pengalaman mulus.'

SUB (Inter 400, 15px, color #737373, max-width 720px):
'Setiap alur dibangun dengan Sui-native features: zkLogin untuk onboarding, PTB untuk atomicity, Walrus untuk audit trail. Tidak bisa direplikasi sebersih ini di EVM.'

BELOW — bento grid 2×3 (or 3×2) of mock UI tiles (.card style, padding 16px, height ~180px each). Each tile shows:

Tile 1 — 'Marketplace UMKM':
  Icon (emoji 📊) + Title bold + 2 mini UMKM card rows (gradient backgrounds amber-rose, emerald-amber) showing '☕ Kopi Senja · Bandung' + funding bar 64% + '18.7% APY'

Tile 2 — 'Portfolio Investor':
  Icon (💧) + Title bold + 3 stream rows with mini sparkline + rate '0.150 IDR/s' + green pulsing dot

Tile 3 — 'Dashboard UMKM':
  Icon (🏪) + Title bold + 2 UMKM cards with 'Distribusi Profit' button + '152 investor' label

Tile 4 — 'Pasar Sekunder':
  Icon (📈) + Title bold + 2 listing rows with 'Best Bid / Best Ask' mini + 'DeepBook' badge

Tile 5 — 'DAO Jury':
  Icon (⚖️) + Title bold + 2 pending report rows with thumbs up/down icons + '3/5 approved' progress bar

Tile 6 — 'Onboard UMKM':
  Icon (✨) + Title bold + 4-step progress indicator + Walrus upload chip 'blob_id: 0x...'

Each tile has small 'See live →' link in bottom-right (color #0D9488, font-num 11px).

BOTTOM strip: small text 'Live demo URL: preview-link.space-z.ai' (font-num, color #737373) + 'Wallet: Google zkLogin (auto)' pill-emerald

FOOTER: 'Arthavest · Sui Overflow 2025' | 'Slide 04 / 08'

Speaker notes: 3-5 hints — guide judges to navigate 5 tabs in order, mention real wallet auto-connect via zkLogin, highlight DeepBook + DAO as bonus features.

slides.title: Architecture — Sui-native features used
slides.task_brief:
ARCHITECTURE SLIDE — cream background.

EYEBROW: 'ARSITEKTUR SUI'

HEADLINE (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 40px):
'Enam kekuatan Sui yang dipakai — bukan gimmick, alasan.'

SUB (Inter 400, 15px, color #737373, max-width 760px):
'Arthavest tidak mungkin sebersih ini di EVM. Setiap fitur Sui yang dipakai menyelesaikan masalah konkret yang tidak bisa diselesaikan chain lain tanpa trade-off besar.'

BELOW — grid 3×2 of feature cards (.card style, padding 20px). Each card has:
  • icon-box (44×44, rounded 12) in emerald or amber alternating
  • Feature name (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 17px)
  • Description (Inter 400, 13px, color #404040, line-height 1.5)
  • Footer chip showing 'Used in: ...' (font-num, 11px, color #737373)

CARD 1 — Object-Centric Model (icon-box-emerald, Material Icon 'boxes'):
  Description: 'Setiap UMKM, saham, dan stream adalah object Move punya ID unik. Ownership langsung tanpa registry mapping.'
  Used in: 'UMKM NFT · Share token · Stream object'

CARD 2 — Programmable Transaction Blocks (icon-box-amber, icon 'workflow'):
  Description: 'Distribusi profit ke ratusan investor dieksekusi dalam 1 tx atomik. Tidak ada window partial failure.'
  Used in: 'Bulk profit distribution · Buy + mint receipt'

CARD 3 — zkLogin (icon-box-emerald, icon 'fingerprint'):
  Description: 'Investor pemula login pakai Google/Twitch — tanpa install wallet atau backup seed phrase. Zero-knowledge proof jaga privasi.'
  Used in: 'Onboarding investor & UMKM'

CARD 4 — Sponsored Transactions (icon-box-amber, icon 'gift'):
  Description: 'Transaksi pertama investor disponsori platform. User tidak perlu SUI untuk mulai — zero gas barrier.'
  Used in: 'First-time buy & withdraw'

CARD 5 — Walrus Storage (icon-box-emerald, icon 'database'):
  Description: 'Dokumen legal UMKM (Akta, NPWP, laporan keuangan) disimpan permanen di Walrus dengan blob ID on-chain. Immutable audit trail.'
  Used in: 'UMKM document verification · DAO jury proof'

CARD 6 — DeepBook (icon-box-amber, icon 'line_chart'):
  Description: 'Saham UMKM yang sudah list bisa dipasar sekunder via DeepBook central limit orderbook. Likuiditas tanpa exit window.'
  Used in: 'Secondary market (live demo)'

FOOTER: 'Arthavest · Sui Overflow 2025' | 'Slide 05 / 08'

Speaker notes: 3-5 hints — emphasize each Sui feature solves a real problem, mention atomic distribution is killer feature, Walrus for trust, DeepBook for liquidity.

slides.title: Market & Traction — RWA Indonesia opportunity
slides.task_brief:
MARKET SLIDE — cream background. Top: market sizing narrative. Bottom: stats row.

EYEBROW: 'PASAR & MOMENTUM'

HEADLINE (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 40px):
'RWA + UMKM Indonesia — pasar miliaran dollar yang terabaikan.'

SUB (Inter 400, 15px, color #737373, max-width 720px):
'Indonesia punya populasi 280 juta dengan adopsi crypto tinggi (rank 7 global), tapi penetrasi RWA masih < 0.1%. Arthavest adalah jembatan antara UMKM tradisional dan investor crypto-native muda.'

MIDDLE — TAM/SAM/SOM horizontal bars (3 stacked rows, each with colored left edge + label + number):
  Row 1 (full width, emerald): TAM — 'Global RWA tokenization' — '$16T by 2030 (BCG)'
  Row 2 (75% width, primary-light): SAM — 'Indonesia UMKM + investor retail' — 'Rp 1.2Q funding gap'
  Row 3 (25% width, amber): SOM — 'Year 1-2 target' — 'Rp 50M dari 500 UMKM onboarded'

BELOW — grid 4 of traction stats (.card style, padding 20px):
  Stat 1: '6' (metric-num) — 'UMKM demo onboarded' — 'spans kuliner, kopi, laundry, kerajinan, pertanian'
  Stat 2: '8' (metric-num-accent) — 'Sui features aktif dipakai' — 'object, PTB, zkLogin, sponsored, Walrus, DeepBook'
  Stat 3: '~800ms' (metric-num) — 'PTB finality di testnet' — 'distribusi 152 investor atomik'
  Stat 4: '0.03 SUI' (metric-num-accent) — 'gas cost distribusi' — 'vs $4-12 di Ethereum L1'

BOTTOM strip — small badge row:
  pill-emerald: 'Top 10 adopsi crypto global (Indonesia)'
  pill-amber: '1.8M investor crypto Indonesia aktif'
  pill-emerald: '500 UMKM target pipeline Q1 2026'

FOOTER: 'Arthavest · Sui Overflow 2025' | 'Slide 06 / 08'

Speaker notes: 3-5 hints — anchor on Indonesia crypto adoption rank, explain TAM/SAM/SOM, mention demo traction validates product, ask jury to remember 0.03 SUI vs ETH gas cost comparison.

slides.title: Roadmap — Testnet → Mainnet → Expansion
slides.task_brief:
ROADMAP SLIDE — cream background.

EYEBROW: 'ROADMAP'

HEADLINE (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 40px):
'Dari hackathon ini ke mainnet dalam 6 bulan.'

SUB (Inter 400, 15px, color #737373, max-width 720px):
'Arthavest sudah punya MVP lengkap dengan 5 alur. Setelah Sui Overflow, kita deploy ke testnet publik, onboarding UMKM pilot, lalu mainnet dengan DAO jury aktif.'

MIDDLE — horizontal timeline with 4 milestone cards connected by emerald dotted line.

Milestone 1 (Q3 2025 — NOW):
  Top: small pill-emerald 'NOW'
  Title: 'Hackathon MVP'
  Bullets:
    • 5 alur lengkap (marketplace, portfolio, owner, secondary, DAO)
    • Move contracts (stream.move + arthavest.move) — belum published
    • Demo data 6 UMKM
    • zkLogin mock

Milestone 2 (Q4 2025):
  Top: small pill-amber 'NEXT'
  Title: 'Testnet Public Launch'
  Bullets:
    • Publish Move contracts ke Sui testnet
    • Real @mysten/dapp-kit integration (sudah siap di code)
    • Real Walrus upload untuk dokumen UMKM
    • 10 UMKM pilot onboarded (Bandung area)

Milestone 3 (Q1 2026):
  Top: small pill-emerald 'MAINNET'
  Title: 'Sui Mainnet Launch'
  Bullets:
    • DAO jury aktif (5 jury terpilih)
    • DeepBook secondary market live
    • Onboarding 100 UMKM (target)
    • Integrasi payment on-ramp (IDR → SUI)

Milestone 4 (Q2 2026):
  Top: small pill-amber 'EXPANSION'
  Title: 'SEA Expansion'
  Bullets:
    • Vietnam & Filipina pilot
    • Mobile app (React Native + dapp-kit)
    • SuiStream primitive packaged sebagai SDK open-source
    • Partnership dengan koperasi UMKM nasional

BELOW timeline — single-row metrics strip:
  '6 bulan' (metric-num) — 'dari hackathon ke mainnet'
  '< $50K' (metric-num-accent) — 'estimated launch cost (gas + audit)'

FOOTER: 'Arthavest · Sui Overflow 2025' | 'Slide 07 / 08'

Speaker notes: 3-5 hints — emphasize MVP already substantial, SuiStream SDK open-source will attract ecosystem builders, mention SEA expansion opportunity.

slides.title: Team & Ask — Why us, what we need
slides.task_brief:
CLOSING SLIDE — cream background with subtle accent gradient.

EYEBROW: 'TIM & ASK'

HEADLINE (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 44px):
'Tim builder Indonesia, juri Sui — bantu kami onboard.'

TWO-COLUMN layout (45% left, 55% right, gap 32px):

LEFT COLUMN — Team:
  Sub-heading: 'Tim' (Plus Jakarta Sans 600, 18px, color #0D9488)
  Two team rows (each with avatar circle 48px, name, role, expertise tags):

  Member 1:
    Avatar: emerald gradient circle with '👤' emoji
    Name: 'Lead Builder' (bold 16px)
    Role: 'Fullstack + Smart Contract' (Inter 500, 13px, color #737373)
    Tags: pill-emerald 'Move' · pill-amber 'Next.js' · pill-emerald 'Sui ecosystem'

  Member 2:
    Avatar: amber gradient circle with '🎨' emoji
    Name: 'Product Designer' (bold 16px)
    Role: 'UI/UX + Brand' (Inter 500, 13px, color #737373)
    Tags: pill-amber 'Figma' · pill-emerald 'Motion design' · pill-amber 'Web3 UX'

  Below team — small note: 'Based in Indonesia · Building for 280M population' (font-num, 11px, color #A3A3A3)

RIGHT COLUMN — Ask:
  Sub-heading: 'Yang kita minta' (Plus Jakarta Sans 600, 18px, color #D97706)

  Three ask cards (.card style, padding 16px, stacked vertically):

  Ask 1:
    Big icon (🏆) + Title: 'Win Sui Overflow' (bold 15px)
    Description: 'Visibility + grant untuk audit smart contract + mainnet deployment cost'

  Ask 2:
    Big icon (🤝) + Title: 'Intro ke koperasi UMKM' (bold 15px)
    Description: 'Pipeline 100+ UMKM pilot — kamu yang kenal ekosistem Indonesia?'

  Ask 3:
    Big icon (💡) + Title: 'SuiStream ecosystem feedback' (bold 15px)
    Description: 'Primitive kami open-source — feedback dari Sui core team akan shape roadmap SDK'

BELOW — single horizontal CTA card (.card-glow style, padding 20px, full width):
  Left side: 'Coba live demo sekarang' (Plus Jakarta Sans 700, 20px) + 'preview-link.space-z.ai' (font-num, 13px, color #0D9488)
  Right side: emerald button 'Jelajahi Demo →' (background #0D9488, color white, padding 10px 20px, rounded 8)

FOOTER: 'Arthavest · Sui Overflow 2025 · Terima kasih' | 'Slide 08 / 08'

Speaker notes: 3-5 hints — close with ask (win = audit + mainnet), intro pipeline ask, demo CTA, thank judges.
